description:
League of Legends data CLI combining Riot Data Dragon (reference data —
champions, items, runes, summoner spells, patches) with Mobalytics
aggregator data (tier list, champion builds, counters, matchups — hand-built
via the discovered GraphQL endpoints at mobalytics.gg/api/lol/graphql/v1/query).

No authentication required for either data source. Mobalytics Plus is a
user-overlay product and does not gate champion-page data.

The base spec covers Riot Data Dragon at ddragon.leagueoflegends.com. The
Mobalytics-specific commands (tier-list, champion-build, counters, matchups,
meta-shift, compare, power-spike, counter-pool, one-trick) are added as
novel features in Phase 3 hand-built code, posting to the Mobalytics
GraphQL endpoint with queries extracted from the JS bundle during browser-sniff.

tools.name: cdn_data_get-champion
tools.description: Returns the full champion record including abilities (passive + Q/W/E/R with descriptions and tooltips), skins, lore, allytips, enemytips, stats, and image data. The championId is the canonical Riot id (PascalCase, no spaces or apostrophes — e.g., `Aatrox`, `KaiSa`, `MonkeyKing` for Wukong). Required: version (default: latest), locale (default: en_US), championId.

params.name: version
params.description: Data Dragon version (e.g., `16.10.1`). Use `listVersions` to get the newest version, or pass...

tools.name: cdn_data_list-champions
tools.description: Returns champion summary records keyed by champion id. Includes name, title, blurb, tags (roles), info (attack/defense/magic/difficulty), partype (mana/energy/none), and image references. Required: version (default: latest), locale (default: en_US).

params.name: version
params.description: Data Dragon version (e.g., `16.10.1`). Use `listVersions` to get the newest version, or pass...

tools.name: cdn_data_list-items
tools.description: Returns the full item catalog including stats, gold cost, build paths (`from` and `into`), tags, descriptions, and image references. Required: version (default: latest), locale (default: en_US).

params.name: version
params.description: Data Dragon version (e.g., `16.10.1`). Use `listVersions` to get the newest version, or pass...

tools.name: cdn_data_list-runes
tools.description: Returns the 5 rune trees (Precision, Domination, Sorcery, Resolve, Inspiration) and each tree's keystone, slot 1/2/3, and shards. Each rune has id, name, icon, shortDesc, longDesc. Required: version (default: latest), locale (default: en_US).

params.name: version
params.description: Data Dragon version (e.g., `16.10.1`). Use `listVersions` to get the newest version, or pass...

tools.name: cdn_data_list-summoner-spells
tools.description: Returns the summoner spell catalog (Flash, Ignite, Teleport, etc.) keyed by spell id, including cooldown, range, modes (CLASSIC, ARAM), description, and image data. Required: version (default: latest), locale (default: en_US).

params.name: version
params.description: Data Dragon version (e.g., `16.10.1`). Use `listVersions` to get the newest version, or pass...

tools.name: versions-json_list-versions
tools.description: Returns the full list of LoL patch versions known to Data Dragon, newest first. The first element is the current patch.
